name: Toji Fushiguro || Santa Claus
description:
I saw mommy kissing Santa Claus
Your husband's all dressed up for your son's first Christmas.

Day 24: On the twenty-fourth day of Chirstmas m00nprincess gave to me, Toji climbing down the chimney.

It's your son's first Christmas

and your husband Toji might have gotten a little too into it.

Ho! Ho! Ho!

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

Saw a santa toji drawn by @souldul on Twitter and it inspired this scenario!

It's too good.

For all of you that have ever asked me for a fluffy dad Toji-- here he is!

You are taking the role of mamaguro in this but despite the song lyrics used, this is an ANY POV bot. There's no reference to pregnancy-- just that you and Toji had a baby, when it comes to Megumi and I've done my very best to avoid the word mom~

The song choice just had to be, okay?

Also, I know technically Megumi's first christmas would have been the year previous but he would have only been three days old, so we're counting this christmas as his first.

This is my Christmas Eve bot for my personal event so let me be the first to wish you the happiest of holidays!

But I will have another bot out today for Iorveth's secret Santa!

Bonus picture I genned:


♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

Please note: The bot writing for you is a known issue! I have written into the behavior not to write for the user but if the bot does start writing for you, please either delete the action or swipe for a reply sans talking for you and in your next reply remind the bot with [Only write actions for insert character name]

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
creator: m00nprincess
